name: mai-cli Plugin
description: Lightweight OpenClaw native bridge for mai-cli consultation tools.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to a mai-cli skill checkout. Defaults to MAI_ROOT, ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/mai, or ~/.hermes/skills/commerce/mai.

dbPath.description: Optional local mai-cli SQLite database path. Defaults to MAI_DB or ~/.local/share/mai-cli/mai-cli.sqlite.
